_meta.description: Seed lore cards for Canon Engine codex, organized by genre

medieval_fantasy.title: The Sundering
medieval_fantasy.description: A cataclysmic magical war shattered the old empire a century ago. The land still bears scars — twisted forests, floating ruins, and rifts leaking raw arcane energy.

medieval_fantasy.title: The Iron Covenant
medieval_fantasy.description: An alliance of blacksmiths, miners, and warriors who control the flow of enchanted metal. Their forges produce the finest weapons in the known world, and their loyalty is bought with coin.

medieval_fantasy.title: Eryndor the Wanderer
medieval_fantasy.description: A mysterious sage who appears in times of crisis. Some say he is immortal; others claim he is a projection of the land itself. He speaks in riddles and vanishes without warning.

space_opera.title: The Collapse
space_opera.description: The Galactic Federation dissolved 50 years ago after the AI Uprising. Now independent systems trade, war, and scheme in a fractured galaxy. Faster-than-light travel persists, but hyperspace lanes are contested.

space_opera.title: The Krynn Collective
space_opera.description: A hive-mind species that absorbs other cultures. They offer perfect unity and efficiency — at the cost of individual identity. Diplomats debate whether they are conquerors or saviors.

space_opera.title: Station Omega-7
space_opera.description: A derelict space station orbiting a dying star. Rumored to contain pre-Collapse technology of immense power. Multiple factions have sent expeditions; none have returned.

gothic_horror.title: The Blight
gothic_horror.description: A creeping supernatural corruption that transforms the living into abominations. It began in the catacombs beneath the old cathedral and spreads outward with each passing moon.

gothic_horror.title: The Order of the Ashen Veil
gothic_horror.description: A secretive cabal of scholars and exorcists who study the Blight. They believe it can be contained but not destroyed, and their methods are as terrifying as the threat they fight.

gothic_horror.title: The Hollow Man
gothic_horror.description: A figure seen in fog-shrouded streets at night. Those who meet his gaze report visions of their own death. Is he a harbinger, a predator, or something else entirely?

western.title: The Broken Treaty
western.description: Twenty years ago, the Cavalry promised the frontier would remain free. They lied. Railroads, mining companies, and settlers have pushed in, and tensions simmer between all parties.

western.title: The Rustlers' Syndicate
western.description: A loose network of cattle thieves, card cheats, and outlaws operating across the territory. Their leader, known only as 'The Dealer,' runs the organization from the shadows.

western.title: Ghost Mesa
western.description: A flat-topped butte where an entire wagon train vanished in 1847. The local tribe warns against visiting at night. Prospectors who ignore the warnings find gold — but lose their minds.

anime_dramatic.title: The Awakening
anime_dramatic.description: When the dimensional barriers thinned, ordinary humans began manifesting supernatural abilities. Society split between the Awakened and the mundane, sparking a cold war of ideology and power.

anime_dramatic.title: The Student Council
anime_dramatic.description: Nominally a school governance body, actually a front for an Awakened power bloc. Each member wields formidable abilities and pursues their own agenda beneath a veneer of civility.

anime_dramatic.title: The Phantom Classroom
anime_dramatic.description: A classroom that appears on the thirteenth floor of the school at midnight. Students who enter find themselves in a pocket dimension where time flows differently. What they learn there changes them forever.

_default.title: The Shattered World
_default.description: Reality itself fractured in a long-forgotten cataclysm. Islands of stability dot an ocean of chaos. Travelers brave the Between to reach distant lands.

_default.title: The Keepers
_default.description: A ancient order dedicated to preserving knowledge across the fractures. They maintain libraries, way-stations, and safe houses throughout the known world.

_default.title: The Threshold
_default.description: A shimmering barrier at the edge of known reality. Beyond it lies the raw chaos of the Between. Some seek to cross it; none have returned unchanged.
